description: VERIFIED LIVE: Associated Press News via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. AP renders story promos as .PagePromo with a .PagePromo-title, so this tool reads the headlines straight from the DOM of your open AP News tab. Navigate the tab to apnews.com or any section (/world-news, /politics, …) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 137 promos with headline and article url extracted correctly.

tools.name: apnews_headlines
tools.description: Story promos on the current AP News page (apnews.com or any section/topic). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline, article url and (when present) description. VERIFIED (137 promos).
